item.description: ### Changed - **The agent's mark now leads each session row.** Claude's spark or OpenAI's knot sits at the start of the row, with the status indicator tucked underneath it. The marks line up in a column now, so you can scan straight down the list to see whose session is whose — previously the mark sat after the project name, where it shifted around depending on how long the name was. Same on the Mac and the iPhone; the Apple Watch row is unchanged. Pair with TestFlight build 26 for the phone side.
